query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('strategic', 'operational', 'financial', 'compliance', 'reputational') NOT NULL,
  likelihood INT NOT NULL,
  impact INT NOT NULL,
  risk_score INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('identified', 'assessed', 'mitigating', 'monitoring', 'closed') DEFAULT 'identified',
  owner INT,
  mitigation_plan TEXT,
  contingency_plan TEXT,
  review_date DATETIME,
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_category (category),
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_score (risk_score)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS risk_assessments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  risk_id INT NOT NULL,
  assessed_by INT NOT NULL,
  assessed_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  previous_score INT,
  new_score INT NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  recommendations JSON,
  INDEX idx_risk (risk_id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contingency_plans (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  risk_id INT NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  trigger_conditions JSON,
  actions JSON,
  resources JSON,
  estimated_cost DECIMAL(15,2),
  time_to_activate VARCHAR(100),
  last_tested DATETIME,
  status ENUM('draft', 'approved', 'active', 'archived') DEFAULT 'draft',
  created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_risk (risk_id)
);
